---
title: "COVID LMR — Analysis (Results Sections 4-5)"
output: html_document
---

Cohort: Updates on era, phase category
```{r}
# Do you have registration date granular enough to split by:
# (a) pre-May 2021 / post-May 2021 / post-May 2023?
cohort<-study_table %>%
  mutate(era = case_when(
    reg_date < as.Date("2021-05-26") ~ "Early Pandemic (to May 2021)",
    reg_date < as.Date("2023-05-05") ~ "Mid-pandemic (May 2021–May 2023)",
    TRUE                             ~ "Post-PHEIC (May 2023 onwards)"
  ))

cohort <- cohort %>%
  mutate(phase_clean = case_when(

    # ── Exploratory ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    st_phase == "phase 1"                   ~ "Phase 1",
    st_phase == "phase 2"                   ~ "Phase 2",
    st_phase == "phase 1,phase 2"           ~ "Phase 1/2",
    st_phase == "phase 0"                   ~ "Phase 1",      # early first-in-human

    # ── Confirmatory ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    st_phase == "phase 3"                   ~ "Phase 3",
    st_phase == "phase 4"                   ~ "Phase 4",
    st_phase == "phase 3,phase 4"           ~ "Phase 3/4",
    st_phase == "phase 2,phase 3"           ~ "Phase 2/3",    # bridge — counts as confirmatory

    # ── Ambiguous multi-phase — take the highest ───────────────────────────────
    st_phase == "phase 1,phase 2,phase 3"   ~ "Phase 2/3",
    st_phase == "phase 2,phase 3,phase 4"   ~ "Phase 3/4",
    st_phase == "phase 2,phase 4"           ~ "Phase 2/3",    # likely data entry error

    # ── Not applicable — interventional but no phase (e.g. device, behavioural)
    st_phase == "not applicable"            ~ "Not applicable",
    st_phase == "phase 4,not applicable"    ~ "Phase 4",
    st_phase == "phase 2,not applicable"    ~ "Phase 2",
    st_phase == "phase 3,not applicable"    ~ "Phase 3",

    # ── Unknown / ambiguous ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  st_phase == "phase 3,unknown"            ~ "Phase 3",
st_phase == "phase 2,unknown"            ~ "Phase 2",
st_phase == "not applicable,unknown"     ~ "Not applicable"),

  # Collapsed 3-group version for figures
  phase_category = case_when(
    phase_clean %in% c("Phase 1", "Phase 2",
                       "Phase 1/2")          ~ "Exploratory (Phase 1/2)",
    phase_clean %in% c("Phase 3", "Phase 4",
                       "Phase 3/4",
                       "Phase 2/3")          ~ "Confirmatory (Phase 3/4)",
    phase_clean == "Not applicable"          ~ "Unspecified",
    TRUE                                     ~ "Unspecified"
  ),

  phase_category = factor(phase_category, levels = c( "Unspecified",
    "Confirmatory (Phase 3/4)",
    "Exploratory (Phase 1/2)"
   
  )))


```

#4) Phases, sample sizes and arms

##Fig 4.1 Phase composition by year
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(lubridate)
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(lubridate)

# Fixed theme (no markdown, pure text)
theme_reg_plotly <- function(base_size = 12) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size, base_family = '"Open Sans", sans-serif') +
    theme(
      text = element_text(color = "#444444"),
      plot.title = element_text(size = base_size + 4, face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = base_size, color = "#666666"),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size),
      axis.text = element_text(size = base_size - 1),
      legend.position = "top",
      legend.direction = "horizontal",
      legend.justification = "center",
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#f9f9f9", color = NA),
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "#E1E5E9", linewidth = 0.5),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      plot.margin = margin(20, 20, 20, 20)
    )
}


# --- 1. Prepare Data ---
plot_data_half <- cohort %>%
  mutate(
       # Create Half-Year Label (e.g., "2020 H1")
    half_year = paste0(year(reg_date), " H", semester(reg_date))
  ) %>%
  # Filter valid dates
  filter(reg_date >= "2020-01-01", reg_date <= "2025-12-31") %>%
  
  # Calculate Counts
  count(half_year, phase_category) %>%
  group_by(half_year) %>%
  mutate(
    pct = n / sum(n),
    total_n = sum(n)
  )

# --- 2. Plot ---
p1<-ggplot(plot_data_half, aes(x = half_year, y = pct, fill = phase_category)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  
  # Percentage Labels (Inside Bars)
  geom_text(aes(label = percent(pct, accuracy = 1)), 
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), 
            color = "white", size = 3, fontface = "bold") +
  
  # Total Count Labels (At Top of Bar)
  # We use a trick: summarise to get 1 row per half_year for the label
  geom_text(data = plot_data_half %>% select(half_year, total_n) %>% distinct(),
            aes(x = half_year, y = 1.05, label = paste0("N=", total_n), fill = NULL),
            color = "grey20", size = 3) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
  
  # Subtle Colors
  scale_fill_manual(values = c( "Unspecified" = "#d3d3d3",
    "Confirmatory (Phase 3/4)" = "#cd5c5c",  # Indian Red
    "Exploratory (Phase 1/2)" = "#4682b4"   # Steel Blue
                         # Light Grey
  )) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Phase Composition of COVID-19 Trials (Half-Yearly 2020-2025)",
    subtitle = "Proportion of trials by phase; Total registered trials (N) at top",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Proportion of New Trials",
    fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_reg_plotly(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), # Rotate labels for readability
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

rm(plot_data_half)
```


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(lubridate)
library(patchwork)

# ── Colour palette (matches figures above) ────────────────────────────────────
col_confirm    <- "#cd5c5c"   # Indian Red — confirmatory
col_explore    <- "#4682b4"   # Steel Blue — exploratory
col_unspec     <- "#d3d3d3"   # Light grey — unspecified
col_discredit  <- "#cd5c5c"
col_novel      <- "#4682b4"
col_other      <- "#aab4c8"

# ── FIG 3.2: Phase × era stacked bar ─────────────────────────────────────────
fig3_2_data <- cohort %>%
  filter(!is.na(phase_category)) %>%
  count(era, phase_category) %>%
  group_by(era) %>%
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n),
         total_n = sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(era = factor(era, levels = c(
    "Early Pandemic (to May 2021)",
    "Mid-pandemic (May 2021–May 2023)",
    "Post-PHEIC (May 2023 onwards)"
  )))

era_totals <- fig3_2_data %>%
  select(era, total_n) %>% distinct()

fig3_2 <- ggplot(fig3_2_data,
                 aes(x = era, y = pct, fill = phase_category)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = percent(pct, accuracy = 1)),
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
            colour = "white", size = 3.2, fontface = "bold") +
  geom_text(data = era_totals,
            aes(x = era, y = 1.06, label = paste0("N=", total_n), fill = NULL),
            colour = "black", size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.12))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Confirmatory (Phase 3/4)" = col_confirm,
    "Exploratory (Phase 1/2)"  = col_explore,
    "Unspecified"              = col_unspec
  )) +
  labs(title = "Confirmatory trial share fell from 49% to 30% post-PHEIC",
       x = NULL, y = "Proportion of trials", fill = NULL) +
  theme_reg_plotly(base_size = 11) +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+coord_flip()


```



```{r}
library(tidytext)   # for reorder_within(); or use tidyr alternative below

# ── WHO evidence classification vectors ──────────────────────────────────────
discredited_drugs <- c(
  "hydroxychloroquine", "azithromycin", "lopinavir/ritonavir",
  "ivermectin", "favipiravir", "chloroquine"
)

novel_drugs_vec <- c(
  "ritonavir (boosted, unspecified)", "molnupiravir", "azvudine",
  "metformin", "protease inhibitors unknown/not on list",
  "monoclonal antibodies unknown/not on list"
)

# ── Join: bring era from cohort into drugcat_plot ─────────────────────────────
# NOTE: do NOT create drug_class — use broad_cat_display already in drugcat_plot
drug_era <- drugcat_plot %>%
  left_join(
    cohort %>% select(st_reg_id, era),
    by = "st_reg_id"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(drug_std), !is.na(era)) %>%
  # Add WHO evidence status as a separate display variable
  mutate(who_status = case_when(
    drug_std %in% discredited_drugs ~ "WHO rec. against",
    drug_std %in% novel_drugs_vec   ~ "Novel / emerging",
    TRUE                            ~ "Other"
  ))

# ── Quick QC: confirm join worked ────────────────────────────────────────────
drug_era %>% count(era)
# Should give ~1971 / 755 / 251 rows (one row per trial×drug)

# ── Top 10 per era ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
top10_per_era <- drug_era %>%
  count(era, drug_std, who_status, display_group, sort = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(era = factor(era, levels = c(
    "Early Pandemic (to May 2021)",
    "Mid-pandemic (May 2021–May 2023)",
    "Post-PHEIC (May 2023 onwards)"
  ))) %>%
  group_by(era) %>%
  slice_max(n, n = 20, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(drug_std = reorder_within(drug_std, n, era))

# ── Plot ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fig3_3 <- ggplot(top10_per_era,
                 aes(x = n, y = drug_std, fill = who_status)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75) +
  facet_wrap(~ era, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
  scale_y_reordered() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "WHO rec. against" = "#cd5c5c",
    "Novel / emerging" = "#4682b4",
    "Other"            = "#aab4c8"
  )) +
  labs(
    title = "Discredited drugs persisted across all eras (top 10 per era)",
    x     = "Number of trials",
    y     = NULL,
    fill  = NULL
  ) +
  theme_reg_plotly(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "top",
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9)
  )+facet_wrap(~ era, scales = "free", ncol = 3)


fig3_3

# ggsave("fig3_3_drugs.png", fig3_3, width = 14, height = 6, dpi = 300)

```

Arms over Era
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(scales)
library(gridExtra)
library(patchwork)
# ── STEP 1: High-confidence explicit arms dataset ─────────────────────────────
# ── STEP 1: High-confidence explicit arms dataset ─────────────────────────────
cohort_arms <- cohort %>%
    filter(!is.na(st_sample), st_sample > 0) %>%
    mutate(
        arm_category = case_when(
            st_intv_arms == 2 ~ "2 Arms",
            st_intv_arms == 3 ~ "3 Arms", 
            st_intv_arms >= 4 ~ "4+ Arms",
            TRUE ~ "Single Arm / Other"
        )
    ) %>%
    filter(arm_category != "Single Arm / Other")   

# QC
cat("Explicit arms dataset: N =", nrow(cohort_arms), "\n")
cohort_arms %>% count(arm_category) %>% print()

# ── FIG 4.2: Arm complexity over time ─────────────────────────────────────────
plot_data_arms <- cohort_arms %>%
    count(era, arm_category) %>%
    group_by(era) %>%
    mutate(
        total_n = sum(n),
        pct = n / total_n
    ) %>%
    ungroup()

fig4_2 <- ggplot(plot_data_arms, aes(y = era, x = pct, fill = arm_category)) +
    geom_col(position = "fill", width = 0.8) +
    geom_text(aes(label = n), 
              position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), 
              color = "white", size = 4, fontface = "bold") +
    geom_text(data = plot_data_arms %>% 
                  distinct(era, total_n),
              aes(x = 1.03, y = era, label = paste0("N=", total_n)),
              inherit.aes = FALSE,
              color = "black", size = 4.2, fontface = "bold",
              hjust = 1) +
    scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(),
                       expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(
        "2 Arms" = "#4D4D4D",
        "3 Arms" = "#2E86C1", 
        "4+ Arms" = "#C0392B"
    )) +
    labs(title = "Trial Arm Complexity Over Time",
         x = "Share of All Multi-Arm Trials",
         y = "Registration Period") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12)
    )


```

##Fig 4.2: Study arms (no) over time

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(lubridate)

# --- 1. Prepare Data ---
plot_data_arms_v2 <- cohort %>%
  mutate(
    # --- The Hybrid Time Bucket Logic ---
    time_label = case_when(
      year(reg_date) >= 2024 ~ as.character(year(reg_date)), # "2024", "2025"
      TRUE ~ paste0(year(reg_date), " H", semester(reg_date)) # "2020 H1", etc.
    ),
    # Create a sort order variable so ggplot knows 2020 H1 < 2024
    sort_date = case_when(
      year(reg_date) >= 2024 ~ floor_date(reg_date, "year"),
      TRUE ~ floor_date(reg_date, "halfyear")
    ),
    
    # Categorize Arms
    arm_category = case_when(
      st_intv_arms == 2 ~ "2 Arms (Standard)",
      st_intv_arms == 3 ~ "3 Arms",
      st_intv_arms >= 4 ~ "4+ Arms (Multi-Arm)",
      TRUE ~ "Single Arm / Other"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(arm_category != "Single Arm / Other") %>%
  # Count
  count(sort_date, time_label, arm_category) %>%
  group_by(sort_date, time_label) %>% # Group by both to keep label
  mutate(
    total_n = sum(n),
    pct = n / total_n
  ) %>% filter(!time_label=="NA HNA")

# --- 2. Plot ---
p6<-ggplot(plot_data_arms_v2, aes(x = reorder(time_label, sort_date), y = pct, fill = arm_category)) +
  geom_col(position = "fill", width = 0.8) + # Width fixed for categorical x-axis
  
  # Absolute Count Labels
  geom_text(aes(label = n), 
            position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5), 
            color = "white", size = 3, fontface = "bold") +
  
  # Total Count Labels
  geom_text(data = plot_data_arms_v2 %>% select(time_label, sort_date, total_n) %>% distinct(),
            aes(x = time_label, y = 1.05, label = total_n, fill = NULL),
            color = "black", size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
  
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))) +
  
  # Colors
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "2 Arms (Standard)" = "#999999",
    "3 Arms" = "#377eb8",
    "4+ Arms (Multi-Arm)" = "#e41a1c"
  )) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Figure 9A. Evolution of Trial Complexity",
    subtitle = "Number of trials by intervention arms (Total count at top)",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Proportion of Registered Trials",
    fill = "Trial Design"
  ) +
  theme_reg_plotly(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )


```


##Fig 4.3 (Alt) Sample sizes by Int group and phase in 2 time periods

```{r}


rm(plot_data_violin,plot_data_periods,plot_data_classes,plot_data_classes1,p1_class,p2_class,p3_class,n_labels,n_labels_class)
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(lubridate)


pharma_table$st_reg_date<-pharma_table$reg_date
# --- Step 2: Clean & Classify ---
plot_data_scatter <- pharma_table %>%
  # Filter valid data
  filter(!is.na(st_reg_date) & !is.na(arm_n_planned) & arm_n_planned > 0) %>%
  mutate(
    # Clean Phase (Check for NA first)
    st_phase = ifelse(is.na(st_phase), "Unknown", st_phase),
    phase_simple = case_when(
      str_detect(st_phase, "phase 3|phase 4") ~ "Phase 3/4 (Confirmatory)",
      str_detect(st_phase, "phase 1|phase 2") ~ "Phase 1/2 (Exploratory)",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )  ) %>%
  # Remove "Other" categories
  filter(display_group != "Other") %>%
  filter(phase_simple != "Other")

# --- Step 3: Verify Data Exists ---
if(nrow(plot_data_scatter) == 0) stop("Data is empty after filtering! Check join or regex.")


library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(lubridate)

# --- 1. Prepare Data & N Labels ---
plot_data_box_time <- plot_data_scatter %>%
    mutate(era = case_when(
    reg_date < as.Date("2021-05-26") ~ "Early Pandemic (to May 2021)",
    reg_date < as.Date("2023-05-05") ~ "Mid-pandemic (May 2021–May 2023)",
    TRUE                             ~ "Post-PHEIC (May 2023 onwards)"
  )) %>% filter(!display_group=="Supportive Care")

# Calculate N per group for labels
n_labels <- plot_data_box_time %>%
    group_by(era, display_group, phase_simple) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(
        # Position the label slightly below the boxplot (log scale)
        y_pos = 1, 
        phase_label = paste0("n=", n)
    )

# --- 2. Plot Faceted Boxplot ---
p10<-ggplot(plot_data_box_time, 
       aes(x = arm_n_planned, 
           y = display_group, 
           fill = phase_simple)) +
    
    # A. Boxplot (horizontal after flip)
    geom_boxplot(
        alpha = 0.6, 
        outlier.shape = 1,
        outlier.size = 1,
        width = 0.7,
        position = position_dodge(width = 0.8)
    ) +
    
    # B. Add N Labels (adjusted for horizontal layout)
    geom_text(
        data = n_labels,
        aes(x = y_pos,  # now x since flipped
            label = phase_label, 
            group = phase_simple),
        position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
        size = 2.5,
        hjust = 1,
        color = "black",
        fontface = "bold"
    ) +
    
    # C. Facet by Time Period
    facet_wrap(~era, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
    
    # D. Reference Lines (now vertical because flipped)
    geom_vline(xintercept = 100, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 500, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
    
    # E. Log Scale
    scale_x_log10(
        labels = label_number(scale_cut = cut_short_scale()),
        limits = c(0.8, NA)
    ) +
    
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(
        "Phase 1/2 (Exploratory)" = "#4575b4", 
        "Phase 3/4 (Confirmatory)" = "#d73027"
    )) +
    
    # F. Labels
    labs(
        title = "Figure 10. Evolution of Trial Power: Early vs Late Pandemic",
        subtitle = "Planned sample size per arm (n = number of trials)",
        x = "Sample Size per Arm (Log10 Scale)",
        y = NULL,
        fill = "Trial Phase"
    ) +
    
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
        legend.position = "top",
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank()
    )


```


```{r}
# ── TWO SEPARATE PLOTS by phase (no n<3 categories) ─────────────────────────

# 1. FILTER: Remove categories with n<3 pharma trials per era/phase combo
plot_data_clean <- plot_data_scatter %>%
  mutate(era = case_when(
    reg_date < as.Date("2021-05-26") ~ "Early Pandemic (to May 2021)",
    reg_date < as.Date("2023-05-05") ~ "Mid-pandemic (May 2021–May 2023)",
    TRUE ~ "Post-PHEIC (May 2023 onwards)"
  )) %>%
  filter(display_group != "Supportive Care") %>%
  # Remove rare categories (n<3 total per era/phase/display_group)
  group_by(era, phase_simple, display_group) %>%
  filter(n() >= 3) %>%
  ungroup()

# N labels (only for kept groups)
n_labels <- plot_data_clean %>%
  group_by(era, display_group, phase_simple) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(y_pos = 1, phase_label = paste0("n=", n))

# ── PLOT 1: Phase 1/2 Exploratory ──────────────────────────────────────────
p10_exploratory <- plot_data_clean %>%
  filter(phase_simple == "Phase 1/2 (Exploratory)") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = arm_n_planned, y = display_group, fill = phase_simple)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.6, outlier.shape = 1, outlier.size = 1, width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(data = n_labels %>% filter(phase_simple == "Phase 1/2 (Exploratory)"),
            aes(x = y_pos, label = phase_label),
            hjust = 1, size = 2.5, fontface = "bold", color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~era, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(100, 500), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  scale_x_log10(labels = label_number(scale_cut = cut_short_scale()), limits = c(0.8, NA)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = "#4575b4") +  # Single color
  labs(title = "Figure 10a. Exploratory Trials (Phase 1/2)",
       subtitle = "Sample size per arm (n≥3 categories only)",
       x = "Sample Size per Arm (Log10)", y = NULL, fill = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(12) + theme(legend.position = "none", strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"))

# ── PLOT 2: Phase 3/4 Confirmatory ─────────────────────────────────────────
p10_confirmatory <- plot_data_clean %>%
  filter(phase_simple == "Phase 3/4 (Confirmatory)") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = arm_n_planned, y = display_group, fill = phase_simple)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.6, outlier.shape = 1, outlier.size = 1, width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(data = n_labels %>% filter(phase_simple == "Phase 3/4 (Confirmatory)"),
            aes(x = y_pos, label = phase_label),
            hjust = 1, size = 2.5, fontface = "bold", color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~era, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(100, 500), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  scale_x_log10(labels = label_number(scale_cut = cut_short_scale()), limits = c(0.8, NA)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = "#d73027") +  # Single color
  labs(title = "Figure 10b. Confirmatory Trials (Phase 3/4)",
       subtitle = "Sample size per arm (n≥3 categories only)",
       x = "Sample Size per Arm (Log10)", y = NULL, fill = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(12) + theme(legend.position = "none", strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"))

# ── SAVE INDIVIDUALLY ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ggsave("fig10a_exploratory.png", p10_exploratory, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
ggsave("fig10b_confirmatory.png", p10_confirmatory, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

# View
p10_exploratory
p10_confirmatory

```


##Fig 4.4A Phase 1/2 Trial Size Distributions 
##Fig 4.4B Phase 3/4 Trial Size Distributions
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(lubridate)

# --- 1. Prepare Data ---
# We keep the raw data this time (no pre-summarising median) for boxplots
plot_data_raw <- cohort %>%
#  filter(st_reg_date >= "2020-01-01", st_reg_date <= "2025-12-31") %>%
  mutate(
    year = year(reg_date),
    st_sample_clean = as.numeric(str_remove_all(as.character(st_sample), "[,a-zA-Z]")),
    phase_simple = case_when(
      str_detect(st_phase, "phase 3|phase 4") ~ "Phase 3/4 (Confirmatory)",
      str_detect(st_phase, "phase 1|phase 2") ~ "Phase 1/2 (Exploratory)",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  ) 



plot_data_raw <-plot_data_raw %>%
  filter(!is.na(st_sample_clean) & st_sample_clean > 0, phase_simple != "Other")

# --- 2. Create a Label Helper DataFrame ---
# This calculates where to put the "n=" label (placed slightly above the 75th percentile)
n_labels <- plot_data_raw %>%
  group_by(year, phase_simple) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    # Position the label at the 75th percentile (top of box) * 1.5 for clearance
    y_pos = quantile(st_sample_clean, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.5, 
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# --- 3. Plot A: Phase 1/2 (Exploratory) ---
p1_box <- ggplot(plot_data_raw %>% filter(phase_simple == "Phase 1/2 (Exploratory)"), 
       aes(x = factor(year), y = st_sample_clean)) +
  
  # A. The Boxplot
  geom_boxplot(fill = "#4575b4", alpha = 0.2, outlier.color = "#4575b4", outlier.alpha = 0.5) +
  
  # B. The N Labels
  geom_text(data = n_labels %>% filter(phase_simple == "Phase 1/2 (Exploratory)"),
            aes(x = factor(year), y = y_pos, label = paste0("n=", n)),
            vjust = 0, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold", color = "black") +
  
  # C. Reference Line
  geom_hline(yintercept = 100, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  annotate("text", x = 0.6, y = 110, label = "Target (100)", hjust = 0, size = 3, color = "grey50") +
  
  # D. Scales & Formatting
  scale_y_log10(labels = label_number(scale_cut = cut_short_scale())) +
  labs(
    title = "Figure 11A. Phase 1/2 Trial Size Distributions",
    subtitle = "Boxplots showing median, IQR, and outliers. 'n=' indicates total trials.",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Sample Size (Log Scale)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

# --- 4. Plot B: Phase 3/4 (Confirmatory) ---
p2_box <- ggplot(plot_data_raw %>% filter(phase_simple == "Phase 3/4 (Confirmatory)"), 
       aes(x = factor(year), y = st_sample_clean)) +
  
  # A. The Boxplot
  geom_boxplot(fill = "#d73027", alpha = 0.2, outlier.color = "#d73027", outlier.alpha = 0.5) +
  
  # B. The N Labels
  geom_text(data = n_labels %>% filter(phase_simple == "Phase 3/4 (Confirmatory)"),
            aes(x = factor(year), y = y_pos, label = paste0("n=", n)),
            vjust = 0, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold", color = "black") +
  
  # C. Reference Line
  geom_hline(yintercept = 500, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  annotate("text", x = 0.6, y = 550, label = "Target (500)", hjust = 0, size = 3, fontface = "bold") +
  
  # D. Scales & Formatting
  scale_y_log10(labels = label_number(scale_cut = cut_short_scale())) +
  labs(
    title = "Figure 11B. Phase 3/4 Trial Size Distributions",
    subtitle = "Boxplots showing median, IQR, and outliers. 'n=' indicates total trials.",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Sample Size (Log Scale)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

# --- 5. Display ---
print(p1_box)
print(p2_box)


```
